metadata.description: Search for adoptable cats near ZIP 90210, open the first result, favorite it, then unfavorite it — verifying the RemoveAnimalFavorite mutation fires.

common_info.email_credentials: credentials to use the assigned disposable email account
common_info.user_info: alex_green_personal_info.json; the dummy user's personal information
common_info.user_resume: PDF resume with disposable email account injected

instruction: On Petfinder, search for adoptable cats near ZIP code 90210, open the profile of the first result, save it as a favorite, and then immediately remove it from your favorites by clicking the heart icon again.
